# Interaction Record Submission

## AI Model
Example: ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok

## Prompt
Paste the original prompt here.

## AI Response
Paste the AI-generated response here.

## Date
YYYY-MM-DD

## Context / Notes
Add short context or notes here.

## Source / Link
Add source link if available.

## Archive Notice
This submission is a proposed interaction record and may be reviewed before being added to the public archive.
